title: Nosebleed 流鼻血处理
scene: Daniel在教室里突然流鼻血，同桌帮他处理。

lines.en: Do not tilt your head back, Daniel. Sit up straight.
It is bleeding a lot. I am scared.
It is OK. Pinch your nose with your thumb and finger.
lines.zh: 没关系。用拇指和食指捏住鼻子。

lines.en: Like this? Should I lean forward?
lines.zh: 像这样吗？我应该往前倾吗？

lines.en: Yes, lean forward slightly. Breathe through your mouth.
How long do I need to hold it?
About ten minutes. Let me get you some tissue.
lines.zh: 大约十分钟。我去给你拿纸巾。

lines.en: It is stopping now. Thank you, Teacher.
Good. Go wash your face and drink some water.
